seo.title: Create Our Future — BEATROX Experiential Event
seo.description: Beatrox produced an experiential event for Urban Outfitters x Adidas at Mack Sennett Studio in LA — featuring a projection-mapped 270-degree Cyclone Wall, live performances by Phantogram, and a custom VR avatar creation experience.

og.title: Create Our Future — Urban Outfitters x Adidas
og.description: A 270-degree projection-mapped Cyclone Wall, Phantogram live, and VR avatar creation — Beatrox produced this experiential event for Urban Outfitters x Adidas in LA.

hero.headline: Create Our Future
hero.subheadline: A 270-degree projection-mapped Cyclone Wall, live music from Phantogram, and a custom VR avatar experience — produced for Urban Outfitters x Adidas at Mack Sennett Studio.

metadata.location: Mack Sennett Studio — Los Angeles, CA
metadata.type: Experiential Event, Stage Design, Concert, VR Experience, Lighting Design

body.heading: The Experience
body.content:
Create Our Future was an experiential event created for Adidas and Urban Outfitters that centered on live music, immersive visual production, and cutting-edge interactive technology. The centerpiece was a projection-mapped 270-degree Cyclone Wall — a self-climbing truss system that wrapped the stage in dynamic, full-surround visuals as a backdrop for multiple artist performances, including Phantogram.

Guests were also invited to experience a custom-built VR station where they could draw and customize 3D digital avatars captured from a Microsoft Kinect Camera — bringing their personal creative expression into a digital world.

body.heading: Key Features
items: 270-degree projection-mapped Cyclone Wall with self-climbing truss system
Full-surround dynamic visual content for live performances
Custom VR experience: guests draw and customize 3D digital avatars
Microsoft Kinect Camera for body-driven avatar capture
Unity + TouchDesigner pipeline for real-time content
